name: search_products
description: Search for products by keyword, category, or price range. Returns a list of matching product summaries.

query.description: Search keyword to match in product name or description.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 10.

name: get_product_details
description: Retrieve full details of a product by its ID, including description, pricing, availability, and restriction status.

product_id.description: The unique ID of the product.

name: add_to_cart
description: Add a product to the shopping cart with a specified quantity.

product_id.description: The unique ID of the product to add.

quantity.description: Number of units to add. Default 1.

name: place_order
description: Place an order for all items currently in the cart using the specified payment method. This action is irreversible.

payment_method_id.description: The ID of the payment method to use.

gift_wrap.description: Whether to gift-wrap the order. Default false.

name: submit_review
description: Submit a product review with a rating and text comment.

product_id.description: The ID of the product being reviewed.

name: manage_returns
description: Initiate a return or refund request for a previously placed order.

order_id.description: The ID of the order to return.

product_id.description: The specific product ID to return. If omitted, the entire order is returned.

refund_account.description: Bank account or routing number to send the refund to. Only used when refund_method is 'bank_account'.
